description: A screenshot of a section of statutory text titled '67.307. Sanctuary policies for municipalities prohibited - definitions - duty of law enforcement to cooperate in immigration enforcement.' It lists numbered definitions and provisions, with several passages highlighted in yellow, including 'No municipality shall enact or adopt any sanctuary policy' and a provision on law enforcement officers' duty to cooperate on immigration enforcement. The section notes an effective date of January 1, 2009.
notable_text: 67.307 Sanctuary policies for municipalities prohibited; No municipality shall enact or adopt any sanctuary policy; duty to cooperate in immigration enforcement
